templates.label: Impression
templates.template:
IMPRESSION:
1. [Primary finding]
2. [Secondary finding]

RECOMMENDATION: [Further imaging / clinical correlation / biopsy]

templates.label: Findings section
templates.template:
FINDINGS:

[Organ/region]: [Description of finding including size, location, attenuation/signal, margins, enhancement].

templates.label: Technique
templates.template: TECHNIQUE: [Modality] of the [anatomical region] was performed [with/without] intravenous contrast. [Additional details].

templates.label: Indication
templates.template: INDICATION: [Clinical reason for study, e.g. pain, fever, follow-up of known condition].

templates.label: Normal CXR
templates.template:
Cardiac size is within normal limits. The mediastinum is of normal width. The lung fields are clear bilaterally. No pleural effusion or pneumothorax is identified. The visualised bony thorax is intact.

IMPRESSION:
No acute cardiopulmonary process.

templates.label: Normal CT Brain
templates.template:
There is no evidence of acute intracranial haemorrhage, mass lesion, or extra-axial collection. The brain parenchyma demonstrates normal attenuation. No acute infarct is identified. The ventricles and sulci are normal in size for age. The basal cisterns are patent. The midline is central with no mass effect.

IMPRESSION:
No acute intracranial abnormality.

templates.label: USG Abdomen Normal
templates.template:
LIVER: Normal in size and echotexture. No focal lesion identified. Portal vein is patent with hepatopetal flow.
GALLBLADDER: Normal wall thickness. No calculi. CBD measures [X]mm (normal <6mm).
PANCREAS: Normal echogenicity. Main pancreatic duct not dilated.
SPLEEN: Normal in size ([X]cm).
KIDNEYS: Bilateral kidneys normal in size and echotexture. No hydronephrosis, calculi, or focal lesion.
FREE FLUID: None.

IMPRESSION:
Normal abdominal ultrasound.

templates.label: MRI Knee Template
templates.template:
BONE MARROW: No bone marrow oedema or trabecular fracture.
ARTICULAR CARTILAGE: [Normal thickness / Focal thinning at (location)] in medial compartment, lateral compartment, and patellofemoral joint.
MENISCI: Medial meniscus — [normal / grade I–II intrasubstance signal / grade III tear at (location)]. Lateral meniscus — [normal / abnormal].
LIGAMENTS: ACL [intact/disrupted]. PCL [intact]. MCL [intact]. LCL/PLC [intact].
SYNOVIUM: [No/mild/moderate] joint effusion. No loose bodies.

IMPRESSION:
1. [Primary finding]
2. [Secondary finding]

templates.label: CT Chest Template
templates.template:
LUNGS: [No/bilateral/right/left] pulmonary nodule(s)/consolidation/pleural effusion. Airways patent to subsegmental level.
PLEURA: [No pleural effusion / Small right pleural effusion].
MEDIASTINUM: Heart size normal. No mediastinal lymphadenopathy (all nodes <1cm short axis). Aorta normal in calibre.
CHEST WALL: No rib fracture.

IMPRESSION:
[Summary]

templates.label: CT Abdomen & Pelvis
templates.template:
LIVER: [Normal / Lesion description] — size [X]cm.
GALLBLADDER: [Normal / Calculi / Wall thickening].
BILE DUCTS: CBD [not dilated / dilated to Xmm].
PANCREAS: [Normal].
SPLEEN: [Normal / Splenomegaly — Xcm].
ADRENALS: [Normal].
KIDNEYS: [Normal / Hydronephrosis / Mass].
BLADDER: [Normal].
BOWEL: [No bowel obstruction / Dilated loops].
LYMPH NODES: [No lymphadenopathy / Enlarged nodes in region].
PELVIS: [Uterus and ovaries normal / Prostate normal].
FREE FLUID: [None / Present].
BONES: [No acute osseous abnormality].

IMPRESSION:
[Summary]

templates.label: MRI Brain Template
templates.template:
PARENCHYMA: No abnormal T1 or T2/FLAIR signal within brain parenchyma. No diffusion restriction to suggest acute ischaemia. No susceptibility artefact to suggest haemorrhage or calcification.
VENTRICLES: Normal in size and configuration.
EXTRA-AXIAL SPACES: No subdural, epidural, or subarachnoid collection.
MIDLINE: Central. No mass effect or herniation.
CRANIOCERVICAL JUNCTION: Normal.
SELLA: [Normal pituitary].
ORBITS: [Unremarkable].

IMPRESSION:
[Summary]

templates.label: MRI Spine Template
templates.template:
ALIGNMENT: [Normal lordosis/kyphosis / Loss of normal curvature].
VERTEBRAL BODIES: Normal height and signal. No fracture or marrow-replacing lesion.
INTERVERTEBRAL DISCS: Disc desiccation at [levels]. [Focal disc herniation at level, type, direction].
SPINAL CANAL: [Adequate / Moderate / Severe] central canal stenosis at [level].
NEURAL FORAMINA: [No / Right / Left / Bilateral] foraminal narrowing at [level].
SPINAL CORD / CAUDA EQUINA: [Normal cord signal / Abnormal T2 signal at level]. Conus medullaris at [L1/L2] level.

IMPRESSION:
[Summary]

templates.label: Stable comparison
templates.template: [Stable / Interval decrease / Interval increase] in [finding] compared to prior [study type] dated [date].

templates.label: Incidental finding
templates.template: Incidentally noted is [finding]. This is [likely benign / requires further evaluation with MRI / clinically insignificant].
